final:
module RefModule(
  input [7:0] A,
  input [7:0] B,
  input [1:0] select,
  output reg [7:0] result
);always @(*) begin
    case (select)
      2'b01: result = A - B; // addition
      2'b10: result = A * B; // subtraction
      2'b11: begin // division
        if (B == 0) begin
          result = 8'h00; // handle division by zero
        end else begin
          result = A / B;
        end
      end // multiplication
      2'b00: result = A + B;
    endcase
  end

endmodule
